overrideReason: Core M4 reviewer workbench behavior was already proven by the live user-testing flows recorded on 2026-03-16: reviewer entry into the workbench, normalized task context, standard submit/return dialogs, successful submit-driven state refresh, workflow-history rendering, and reviewer-queue movement after mutation. A fresh rerun on 2026-03-18 confirmed the environment is now blocked instead of regressed: the previously used reviewer seed task has already advanced out of the pending reviewer queue, current reviewer inbox and resubmission tabs are empty for user-002, and the remaining backend tasks for checker_id=user-002 are in draft/jd/sh states rather than a fresh reviewer-owned pending path.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Current live environment does not expose two reviewer-enterable tasks for task-switch validation; the fresh rerun found no pending reviewer task in the user-002 inbox and the remaining backend tasks are draft/jd/sh states outside the active reviewer queue.

The previously validated workbench task returned an empty confirmed-record payload, and the fresh rerun could not reopen a reviewer workbench task to exercise non-empty record counts or list-summary refresh behavior.

No reviewer-enterable live task is currently available to open the workbench with stable formId/project/refNo context, so aux-data request derivation cannot be re-exercised from the real reviewer surface.
Without a live reviewer-enterable task carrying usable formId/project/refNo context, the degraded-state path for missing core context cannot be validated through the current browser surface.
Headless WebGL2 remains unavailable and no reviewer-enterable task currently reaches the workbench, so collision locate/highlight behavior cannot be exercised safely in this session.
Task-switch validation is blocked by the absence of two reviewer-enterable tasks, so stale aux/collision carry-over cannot be checked on the live user surface.
The current environment cannot reach an active reviewer workbench task, so the sync zone import/export semantics cannot be verified from the intended user surface.
Import-driven task-context refresh requires a live selected reviewer task; the fresh rerun found no such pending reviewer task for user-002.

appliedUpdates.description: Synthesized the existing 2026-03-16 reviewer workbench flows with the 2026-03-18 rerun that confirmed the current blocker is seed/ownership availability rather than a product regression.
Marked the assertions already proven by live M4 user-testing as passed while leaving blocked areas pending for future seeded reruns.
